lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again. Can you tell me about this training area?

lines.speaker: Tolna
lines.text: Of course, if you enter the rift next to me, you'll find a large dungeon filled with four kinds of beasts. You will recognise them from the gauntlet in which you helped me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: OK, I didn't have too many problems beating them before.

lines.speaker: Tolna
lines.text: You might find it harder now! At least one is bound to cause you some sort of threat. Be careful! There isn't much in the way of items or treasure down there, it's purely for practicing your combat!
